description: Irregular triangle read by rows: row n consists of the coefficients in the expansion of the polynomial (1/(2*w)) * (x^2 + x) * ((((v + w)/2)^(n - 1)) * (x^2 + 2*x + 4 + w) - (((v - w)/2)^(n - 1)) * (x^2 + 2*x + 4 - w)), where v = x^2 + 4*x + 4 and w = sqrt(x^4 + 4*x^3 + 12*x^2 + 20*x + 12).
